narrative:
Defiance Twp A (precinct in Defiance County) has 430 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
